racing_style: Front-runner who steals the rail early
rivalry_hook: Beat you to every first turn last season and never lets you forget it.
intro_line: Copper Gate likes the front. Expect early pressure.
approach_line: Copper Gate is pressing on your shoulder.
passing_line: Copper Gate surges past with a hard stride.
falling_behind_line: Copper Gate is spent early and dropping back.
blocking_line: Copper Gate cuts inside and shuts your rail.

racing_style: Patient closer who strikes at the wire
rivalry_hook: Sat behind you all year, then took the title by a nose.
intro_line: River Chime waits for the late move.
passing_line: River Chime slips by with a late surge.
falling_behind_line: River Chime eases off, saving it for later.
blocking_line: River Chime drifts across and boxes you in.

racing_style: Mudder who thrives when the weather turns
rivalry_hook: Owns every rain-soaked track you both have ever run.
intro_line: Storm Marrow gets braver in bad weather.
falling_behind_line: Storm Marrow loses grip and slides back.
blocking_line: Storm Marrow leans in and pins you to the rail.

racing_style: Explosive sprinter with a short fuse
rivalry_hook: One devastating burst is all it needs to break your race.
intro_line: Golden Switch is dangerous in short bursts.
approach_line: Golden Switch is winding up a sprint.
falling_behind_line: Golden Switch burns out and fades hard.
blocking_line: Golden Switch swerves over to break your run.

racing_style: Reckless pacesetter who burns hot and fades
rivalry_hook: Dares you to chase a pace neither of you can hold.
intro_line: Brass Comet burns hot early and fades.
approach_line: Brass Comet is charging on your outside.
passing_line: Brass Comet blazes past in a sprint.
falling_behind_line: Brass Comet has nothing left and drops away.
blocking_line: Brass Comet veers in and steals your line.

racing_style: Ice-cold finisher who hoards every stride
rivalry_hook: Never panics, and always seems to have one more gear than you.
intro_line: Willow Drift saves everything for the line.
approach_line: Willow Drift is drifting up on you.
passing_line: Willow Drift sweeps by with a late kick.
falling_behind_line: Willow Drift sits back, biding time as ever.
blocking_line: Willow Drift eases across and closes the gap ahead.
